revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-265

A function which tends to carry out a control operation but which, when considered alone, cannot monitor the correct achievement of the command thus transmitted.

Reference: I.E.C.

{{IALAFooter}}
